name: Grupo Famsa, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Famsa, S.A.B. de C.V., through its subsidiaries, operates in the wholesale and retail of consumer products in Mexico and the United States. It sells furniture, appliances, electronics, clothing and footwear, and other products. The company is also involved in banking operation, including the provision of deposit and loan products, as well as provides financing services. It operates a network of 379 retail stores in Mexico; and 22 retail stores in Texas and Illinois. Grupo Famsa, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1970 and is based in Monterrey, Mexico.
